name: Prajesh
body: Getting exact numbers here. Awesome website for all academic calculations. Keep going.👍

name: Yuvaraja Reddy
body: Highly appreciated for this professional website. If you have enough time, please make a demo video by animations on how to use it and append the video in this site. Thank you Sabarish.

name: archit
body: I am a current student just a year junior, but this is a great website bro — like, loved it man. I haven't even used the calculator yet but the UI got me already.

name: Karthikeya
body: Try to add the subject names under not-compulsory to fill, because we can save that and use afterwards too. Whoever wishes to fill can do so, otherwise can leave it. Thank you. By the way this website is absolutely great.

name: Vishnu
body: This website helped me set my goals and achieve the CGPA I wanted. Really thank you very very much.

name: Praveen Kumar Nandyala
body: Excellent website to calculate attendance easily

name: P Thavamani
body: It is a really useful website with a lot of helpful features for the students.
